title: Install and maintain plant displays
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install and maintain plant displays demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess client requirements and document plant display plan

pcs.text: Consult with client and determine requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client and determine requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client and determine requirements.

pcs.text: Assess and record site factors impacting plant display requirements prior to installation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record site factors impacting plant display requirements prior to installation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record site factors impacting plant display requirements prior to installation.

pcs.text: Assess and record environmental conditions prior to installation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record environmental conditions prior to installation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record environmental conditions prior to installation.

pcs.text: Review project suitability and site conditions, constraints and maintenance requirements, and record findings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review project suitability and site conditions, constraints and maintenance requirements, and record findings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review project suitability and site conditions, constraints and maintenance requirements, and record findings.

pcs.text: Select plants to meet the requirements of the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select plants to meet the requirements of the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select plants to meet the requirements of the site.

pcs.text: Identify and schedule materials, equipment and machinery applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and schedule materials, equipment and machinery applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and schedule materials, equipment and machinery applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Determine the benefit of reviving or replacing plants
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the benefit of reviving or replacing plants?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the benefit of reviving or replacing plants.

pcs.text: Document display plan according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document display plan according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document display plan according to workplace procedures.

elements.title: Install plant display

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain safety equipment and personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install plants according to display plan.

pcs.text: Prune damaged or unnecessary material to enhance the presentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prune damaged or unnecessary material to enhance the presentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prune damaged or unnecessary material to enhance the presentation.

pcs.text: Water and fertilise plants as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Water and fertilise plants as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Water and fertilise plants as required.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain site according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain site according to workplace requirements.
